# Security Policy

## Supported Versions

| Version | Supported          |
| ------- | ------------------ |
| 1.0.x   | :white_check_mark: |

## Reporting a Vulnerability

If you discover a security vulnerability in TradePress, please report it responsibly:

1. **Do not** open a public GitHub issue for security vulnerabilities
2. Email the details to the project maintainer via [GitHub private vulnerability reporting](https://github.com/RyanBayne/TradePress/security/advisories/new)
3. Include steps to reproduce the issue
4. Allow reasonable time for a fix before public disclosure

We aim to acknowledge reports within 48 hours and provide a fix within 7 days for critical issues.
